title: George teens win silver at national basketball championship
description: GEORGE NEWS - Jeremiah Eksteen and Miguel...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Jeremiah Eksteen and Miguel Malinga, two talented players from the George Hustlers Basketball Club in Denneoord, represented the Western Cape u.16 basketball team at the National School Sports Championship held in Pretoria during the December holidays.

The duo brought home silver medals after an intense final match against KwaZulu-Natal.

Free basketball clinic

Basketball is gaining momentum in George, and enthusiasts can look forward to a basketball clinic happening on Saturday 18 January at the Denneoord basketball court (St Paul Street park).

Whether you're a beginner or looking to sharpen your skills, this clinic is an excellent opportunity to learn and grow in the sport.

For more information, contact Jean-Pierre on 061 834 0081.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
